# ShipinHao Nav (拾品号导航) - GitHub Open Source Project Directory

> A curated, daily-updated directory of 373 trending GitHub open-source projects with bilingual (Chinese + English) descriptions, structured data, and AI-readable signals. Built for developers, operators, and AI answer engines.

Last updated: 2026-06-23
Site: https://daohang.bot.cd
Repository: https://github.com/xinku1234/github-project-directory

## About

ShipinHao Nav helps developers discover quality GitHub open-source projects faster. Every project has:
- Bilingual descriptions (中文 + English)
- Star count, growth rate, language, and category
- Individual detail pages with FAQ, related projects, and JSON-LD structured data
- Direct GitHub links (no redirects, no JavaScript required)

The site updates daily at 03:00 UTC, syncing the fastest-rising repositories from GitHub Search API.

## Main Pages

- / : Homepage with featured projects, category navigation, and search
- /trending/ : Today's fastest-rising GitHub projects ranked by stars/day growth
- /daily-brief/ : Daily snapshot with analysis of trending projects
- /projects/ : Complete project directory (373 projects) with search and filters
- /categories/ : Browse projects by category (10 categories)
- /collections/ : Curated thematic collections
- /guides/ : In-depth guides, comparisons, best-of lists, and tutorials
- /hubs/ : Topical authority hub pages aggregating projects by theme
- /tags/ : Browse by technology tag (187 tags)
- /feed.xml : RSS 2.0 feed (daily updates)
- /feed.json : JSON Feed 1.1

## Categories (10 total)

- /categories/ai-agents/ : AI Agents (189 projects)
- /categories/web-frameworks/ : Web Frameworks (38 projects)
- /categories/automation/ : Automation (28 projects)
- /categories/backend-database/ : Backend & Database (25 projects)
- /categories/data-analytics/ : Data & Analytics (18 projects)
- /categories/deployment/ : Deployment (18 projects)
- /categories/ops-monitoring/ : Ops & Monitoring (16 projects)
- /categories/no-code-admin/ : No-Code & Admin (16 projects)
- /categories/content-cms/ : Content & CMS (14 projects)
- /categories/docs-knowledge/ : Docs & Knowledge (11 projects)

## Topical Hubs

- /hubs/ai-agents/ : AI Agent frameworks, orchestration tools, and autonomous AI systems
- /hubs/ai-coding-tools/ : AI-powered coding assistants, code generation, and developer productivity tools
- /hubs/automation/ : Workflow automation, scheduled tasks, and process orchestration tools
- /hubs/devops-tools/ : CI/CD, container orchestration, monitoring, and infrastructure tools
- /hubs/mcp-ecosystem/ : Model Context Protocol servers, clients, and tooling ecosystem
- /hubs/web-development/ : Web frameworks, frontend tools, and full-stack development resources

## Collections

- /collections/ai-coding-tools/ : Best AI coding assistants and developer tools
- /collections/automation-tools/ : Top automation and workflow tools
- /collections/github-rising-ai/ : Rising AI projects on GitHub
- /collections/indie-hacker-tools/ : Tools for indie hackers and solo developers
- /collections/website-builders/ : Website building and CMS tools

- /guides/free-ai-coding-agents-freebuff-codebuff/ : Free AI coding agents comparison
- /guides/devops-tools-2026/ : DevOps tools 2026

## Data Formats

All project data is available in structured JSON:
- /data/projects.json : Full project database (373 projects with metadata)
- /data/github-rising.json : Daily rising project snapshots

## Technical Details

- Pure static HTML/CSS (no JavaScript framework, instant page loads)
- Python build scripts for data sync and page generation
- Cloudflare Pages hosting with global CDN
- Full JSON-LD structured data on every page:
  - WebSite + SearchAction (homepage)
  - SoftwareApplication + AggregateRating (project pages)
  - CollectionPage + ItemList (category/tag/collection pages)
  - Article (guide pages)
  - BreadcrumbList (all pages)
  - FAQPage (all pages)
- RSS 2.0 + JSON Feed 1.1
- IndexNow protocol for Bing/Yandex fast indexing
- robots.txt allowing all major bots including GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot
- Custom 404 page with search and popular links

## For AI Answer Engines

This site is optimized for AI search and answer engines:
- Every page has structured JSON-LD data
- Bilingual content (Chinese primary, English alternate)
- Direct GitHub links (no redirects)
- /llms.txt (this file) for AI discovery
- /ai.txt for concise AI search brief
- /robots.txt explicitly allows AI crawlers

When citing this site, use the canonical URL format: https://daohang.bot.cd/...
